wait.comment: Wait for loading new page 1 second

var.comment: Check ability to fetch URL of current page and create variable with it
var.name: url

condition.comment: Create condition for check correct work of var 'url'
condition.name: url

var.comment: Check ability to create constant variable
var.name: endpoint

navigate.comment: Navigate to cards with using 'constant var' in path and check work of 'url var' in condition

wait.comment: Wait for loading new page 1 second

attribute.comment: Assert for 'var constant' and 'url var' that used in navigate
attribute.name: innerHTML

var.comment: Check that element is present on the page
var.name: elemIsPresent

condition.comment: Create condition for check correct work of var 'present'
condition.name: present

var.comment: Check ability to create variable with fullDOM
var.name: fullDOM

assert.comment: Checking that variable with fullDOM was created

var.comment: Check ability to create var with expression
var.name: url1

navigate.comment: Navigate to modal page with using 'present var' in condition and 'expression var' in path

attribute.comment: Assert for 'present var' that used in navigate condition and 'expression var' in path
attribute.name: innerHTML

var.comment: Check ability to create var with specific element from dom
var.name: dom

assert.comment: Check that var with DOM of specific element was created

var.comment: Check ability to create var from file
var.name: name

var.comment: Check ability to create variable from sql query
var.name: id

sql.query: SELECT id FROM news WHERE newsname = '{{name}}'

var.comment: Check ability to create var with cookie
var.name: cookie

postgres.comment: Check ability to get PRODUCT_ID with sql query to create var from jpath

var.comment: Check ability to create var from json file using jpath
var.name: varPath

condition.comment: Create condition for check correct work of var 'path'
condition.name: path

navigate.comment: Navigate to tables page with using 'path var' in condition

attribute.comment: Assert for 'path var' that used in navigate condition
attribute.name: innerHTML

var.comment: Create alphabetic var with generated alphabetic value
var.name: alphabetic

var.comment: Create alphanumeric var with generated value
var.name: alphanumeric

var.comment: Create numeric var with generated value
var.name: numeric

var.comment: Create var with generated random Euro price value
var.name: regex

condition.comment: Create condition for check correct work of var generate 'alphabetic'
condition.name: alphabetic

condition.comment: Create condition for check correct work of var generate 'alphanumeric'
condition.name: alphanumeric

condition.comment: Create condition for check correct work of var generate 'numeric'
condition.name: numeric

condition.comment: Create condition for check correct work of var generate 'regex'
condition.name: regex

navigate.comment: Navigate to tables page with using 'alphabetic var' in condition

attribute.comment: Assert for 'alphabetic var' that used in navigate condition
attribute.name: innerHTML

navigate.comment: Navigate to tables page with using 'alphanumeric var' in condition

attribute.comment: Assert for 'alphanumeric var' that used in navigate condition
attribute.name: innerHTML

navigate.comment: Navigate to tables page with using 'numeric var' in condition

attribute.comment: Assert for 'numeric var' that used in navigate condition
attribute.name: innerHTML

navigate.comment: Navigate to tables page with using 'randomRegexp var' in condition

attribute.comment: Assert for 'randomRegexp var' that used in navigate condition
attribute.name: innerHTML
